text: This is the symbol of this reactor, step 1, this is the cathode flow plate, it has a flow
field, step 2, this is the cathode electrode, the cathode is prepared by spray coating
copper oxide catalyst on H23C3 carbon paper, the catalyst loading is 3mg per cm2, the active
step 3, this is the cathode gasket, the gasket thickness is 0.2mm, the gasket thickness is
0.2mm, the inner window size is 1x1cm, step 4, we place the alkaline ion exchange membrane,
this membrane is cysteine X3760, step 5, this is the middle chamber, the chamber thickness
is 10mm and the window size is 1x1cm, this chamber is used to hold this solid electrolyte,
